sentences.sentence: Brick by brick, six-year-old Alice is building a magical kingdom.
sentences.translation: 六岁的爱丽丝正一块砖一块砖地搭建一个神奇的王国。
difficult_points: Brick by brick 表示动作逐步进行，强调搭建过程。
six-year-old 是复合形容词，整体修饰 Alice。
is building 使用现在进行时，让读者看到正在发生的游戏场景。

expressions.meaning_zh: 一块砖一块砖地；逐步地

sentences.sentence: Imagining fairy-tale turrets and fire-breathing dragons, wicked witches and gallant heroes, she's creating an enchanting world.
sentences.translation: 她想象着童话般的塔楼、喷火的龙、邪恶的女巫和英勇的英雄，正在创造一个迷人的世界。

structure.text: Imagining fairy-tale turrets and fire-breathing dragons, wicked witches and gallant heroes

difficult_points: 句首 Imagining 是现在分词短语，说明她创造世界时伴随的想象内容。
fairy-tale、fire-breathing、wicked、gallant 连续营造童话故事语境。
she's 是 she is 的缩写，后接现在进行时 creating。

sentences.sentence: Although she isn't aware of it, this fantasy is helping her take her first steps towards her capacity for creativity and so it will have important repercussions in her adult life.
sentences.translation: 虽然她并没有意识到这一点，但这种幻想正在帮助她迈出发展创造力的第一步，因此会对她的成年生活产生重要影响。

structure.text: Although she isn't aware of it
is helping her take her first steps towards her capacity for creativity
and so it will have important repercussions in her adult life

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，表示爱丽丝并不知道游戏的深层作用。
helping her take her first steps towards... 表示帮助她开始发展某种能力。
it 指 this fantasy，而不是 creativity。
repercussions 指后续影响，通常强调较长期的结果。

sentences.sentence: Minutes later, Alice has abandoned the kingdom in favour of playing schools with her younger brother.
sentences.translation: 几分钟后，爱丽丝已经放弃了那个王国，转而和弟弟玩起了“学校”游戏。

structure.text: in favour of playing schools with her younger brother

difficult_points: has abandoned 是现在完成时，表示刚刚发生并影响当前游戏状态的变化。
in favour of 表示“转而选择”，不是单纯的“支持”。
playing schools 指扮演学校场景的游戏。

sentences.sentence: When she bosses him around as his 'teacher', she's practising how to regulate her emotions through pretence.
sentences.translation: 当她以“老师”的身份指挥弟弟时，她正在通过假装游戏练习如何调节自己的情绪。

structure.text: When she bosses him around as his 'teacher'
's practising how to regulate her emotions through pretence
how to regulate her emotions through pretence

difficult_points: bosses him around 是口语表达，表示对别人发号施令。
as his 'teacher' 说明她在游戏中扮演的身份。
how to regulate her emotions 是 practising 的宾语内容，表示练习的技能。
through pretence 表示通过假装或角色扮演来学习。

sentences.sentence: Later on, when they tire of this and settle down with a board game, she's learning about the need to follow rules and take turns with a partner.
sentences.translation: 再后来，当他们玩腻了这个游戏，安静下来玩桌游时，她正在学习遵守规则以及和伙伴轮流行动的必要性。

structure.text: when they tire of this and settle down with a board game
's learning about the need to follow rules and take turns with a partner

difficult_points: when 从句里 tire of 和 settle down 是并列动作，描述游戏活动的转换。
this 指前一句中的 playing schools。
the need 后接两个并列不定式：to follow rules 和 take turns。
take turns with a partner 表示和同伴轮流进行。

sentences.sentence: 'Play in all its rich variety is one of the highest achievements of the human species,' says Dr David Whitebread from the Faculty of Education at the University of Cambridge, UK.
sentences.translation: 英国剑桥大学教育学院的大卫·怀特布雷德博士说：“游戏以其丰富多样的形式，是人类这个物种最高成就之一。”

structure.text: 'Play in all its rich variety is one of the highest achievements of the human species,'
from the Faculty of Education at the University of Cambridge, UK

difficult_points: 引号内是直接引语，后面的 says 引出说话者。
in all its rich variety 插入说明 play 的丰富形式。
one of the highest achievements 后接复数 achievements，表示“最高成就之一”。

sentences.sentence: 'It underpins how we develop as intellectual, problem-solving adults and is crucial to our success as a highly adaptable species.'
sentences.translation: “它支撑着我们如何发展成有智力、能解决问题的成年人，并且对我们作为高度适应性物种的成功至关重要。”

structure.text: underpins how we develop as intellectual, problem-solving adults
how we develop as intellectual, problem-solving adults
and is crucial to our success as a highly adaptable species

difficult_points: It 指上一句的 play。
underpins 表示“支撑、构成基础”，说明游戏对发展有根本作用。
how we develop 是宾语从句，作为 underpins 的宾语。
as a highly adaptable species 表示人类作为一个高度适应性的物种。

sentences.sentence: Recognising the importance of play is not new: over two millennia ago, the Greek philosopher Plato extolled its virtues as a means of developing skills for adult life, and ideas about play-based learning have been developing since the 19th century.
sentences.translation: 认识到游戏的重要性并不是新鲜事：两千多年前，希腊哲学家柏拉图就称赞游戏作为培养成人生活技能手段的价值，而关于游戏化学习的理念自19世纪以来也一直在发展。

structure.text: over two millennia ago, the Greek philosopher Plato extolled its virtues as a means of developing skills for adult life
and ideas about play-based learning have been developing since the 19th century

difficult_points: Recognising the importance of play 是动名词短语作主语。
冒号后用两个历史事实解释“这并不新”。
its virtues 中 its 指 play，virtues 指其价值或优点。
have been developing 是现在完成进行时，强调理念从19世纪持续发展到现在。

sentences.sentence: But we live in changing times, and Whitebread is mindful of a worldwide decline in play, pointing out that over half the people in the world now live in cities.
sentences.translation: 但我们生活在不断变化的时代，怀特布雷德意识到全球范围内游戏活动正在减少，并指出如今世界上一半以上的人口生活在城市中。

structure.text: But we live in changing times
and Whitebread is mindful of a worldwide decline in play
pointing out that over half the people in the world now live in cities
that over half the people in the world now live in cities

difficult_points: But 表示从历史认可游戏转向现代环境中的问题。
is mindful of 表示“注意到、意识到”，后接 decline in play。
pointing out 是现在分词短语，补充说明 Whitebread 的观点。
over half the people in the world 是 that 从句的主语。

sentences.sentence: 'The opportunities for free play, which I experienced almost every day of my childhood, are becoming increasingly scarce,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“我童年时几乎每天都能经历的自由游戏机会，正变得越来越少。”

structure.text: 'The opportunities for free play, which I experienced almost every day of my childhood, are becoming increasingly scarce,'
which I experienced almost every day of my childhood

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 free play 的机会是他说话者童年常有的经历。
are becoming increasingly scarce 用进行时强调机会正在不断减少。
he says 是引述语，he 指 Whitebread。

sentences.sentence: Outdoor play is curtailed by perceptions of risk to do with traffic, as well as parents' increased wish to protect their children from being the victims of crime, and by the emphasis on 'earlier is better' which is leading to greater competition in academic learning and schools.
sentences.translation: 户外游戏受到多种因素限制：人们对交通相关风险的感知、父母更强烈地想保护孩子不成为犯罪受害者的愿望，以及“越早越好”的观念；这种观念正在导致学业学习和学校中的竞争加剧。

structure.text: is curtailed by perceptions of risk to do with traffic
as well as parents' increased wish to protect their children from being the victims of crime
and by the emphasis on 'earlier is better' which is leading to greater competition in academic learning and schools
which is leading to greater competition in academic learning and schools

difficult_points: is curtailed by 是被动结构，说明户外游戏被外部因素限制。
to do with traffic 后置修饰 perceptions of risk，表示风险与交通有关。
as well as 和 and by 连接多个导致 outdoor play 减少的因素。
which 指 the emphasis on 'earlier is better'，说明这种观念导致学业竞争。

sentences.sentence: International bodies like the United Nations and the European Union have begun to develop policies concerned with children's right to play, and to consider implications for leisure facilities and educational programmes.
sentences.translation: 联合国和欧盟等国际机构已经开始制定与儿童游戏权利有关的政策，并考虑其对休闲设施和教育项目的影响。

structure.text: International bodies like the United Nations and the European Union
have begun to develop policies concerned with children's right to play
concerned with children's right to play
and to consider implications for leisure facilities and educational programmes

difficult_points: International bodies like... 中 like 表示举例，而非“喜欢”。
have begun to develop 表示这些机构已经开始行动。
concerned with... 是过去分词短语，修饰 policies。
to develop 和 to consider 是 have begun 后的并列不定式。

sentences.sentence: But what they often lack is the evidence to base policies on.
sentences.translation: 但它们常常缺少的是可作为政策依据的证据。

structure.text: is the evidence to base policies on

difficult_points: what they often lack 是名词性从句作主语，意为“它们经常缺少的东西”。
they 指上一句的 international bodies。
to base policies on 后置修饰 evidence，on 的宾语是 evidence。

sentences.sentence: 'The type of play we are interested in is child-initiated, spontaneous and unpredictable - but, as soon as you ask a five-year-old "to play", then you as the researcher have intervened,' explains Dr Sara Baker.
sentences.translation: 萨拉·贝克博士解释说：“我们感兴趣的游戏类型是由儿童发起的、自发的、不可预测的——但是，一旦你要求一个五岁的孩子‘去玩’，那么你作为研究者就已经介入了。”

structure.text: 'The type of play we are interested in is child-initiated, spontaneous and unpredictable - but, as soon as you ask a five-year-old "to play", then you as the researcher have intervened,'
as soon as you ask a five-year-old "to play"

difficult_points: we are interested in 省略了关系词，修饰 The type of play。
child-initiated, spontaneous and unpredictable 三个形容词并列描述研究对象。
as soon as 引导时间状语从句，说明研究者介入的时刻。
you as the researcher 强调研究者身份本身会改变游戏情境。

sentences.sentence: And we want to know what the long-term impact of play is.
sentences.translation: 而且我们想知道游戏的长期影响是什么。

structure.text: what the long-term impact of play is

difficult_points: And 连接贝克上一句对研究困难的解释和下一步研究目标。
what 引导宾语从句，作 know 的宾语。
long-term impact 指长期影响，而不是眼前效果。

sentences.sentence: It's a real challenge.'
sentences.translation: 这确实是一个真正的挑战。”
difficult_points: It's 是 It is 的缩写，It 指研究游戏长期影响这件事。
a real challenge 强调这项研究在方法上非常困难。

sentences.sentence: Dr Jenny Gibson agrees, pointing out that although some of the steps in the puzzle of how and why play is important have been looked at, there is very little data on the impact it has on the child's later life.
sentences.translation: 珍妮·吉布森博士表示同意，并指出，尽管人们已经研究了游戏为何以及如何重要这一谜题中的部分环节，但关于游戏对儿童后来生活影响的数据仍然很少。

structure.text: pointing out that although some of the steps in the puzzle of how and why play is important have been looked at, there is very little data on the impact it has on the child's later life
although some of the steps in the puzzle of how and why play is important have been looked at
there is very little data on the impact it has on the child's later life

difficult_points: pointing out 是现在分词短语，说明 Gibson 同意时进一步指出的内容。
although 从句和主句 there is... 构成让步关系。
the puzzle of how and why play is important 表示关于游戏重要性的复杂问题。
it has on the child's later life 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 impact。

sentences.sentence: Now, thanks to the university's new Centre for Research on Play in Education, Development and Learning (PEDAL), Whitebread, Baker, Gibson and a team of researchers hope to provide evidence on the role played by play in how a child develops.
sentences.translation: 现在，得益于该大学新的教育、发展与学习中的游戏研究中心（PEDAL），怀特布雷德、贝克、吉布森和一组研究人员希望提供证据，说明游戏在儿童发展方式中所发挥的作用。

structure.text: thanks to the university's new Centre for Research on Play in Education, Development and Learning (PEDAL)
Whitebread, Baker, Gibson and a team of researchers
hope to provide evidence on the role played by play in how a child develops

difficult_points: thanks to 表示“由于、得益于”，引出研究得以推进的条件。
Whitebread, Baker, Gibson and a team of researchers 是并列主语。
the role played by play 中第一个 play 是名词“游戏”，played 是过去分词。
how a child develops 是介词 in 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: 'A strong possibility is that play supports the early development of children's self-control,' explains Baker.
sentences.translation: 贝克解释说：“一个很大的可能性是，游戏支持儿童自我控制能力的早期发展。”

structure.text: 'A strong possibility is that play supports the early development of children's self-control,'
that play supports the early development of children's self-control

difficult_points: A strong possibility is that... 用表语从句提出研究假设。
supports 在这里表示“促进、支持发展”，不是物理支撑。
children's self-control 指儿童自我控制能力，是后文研究重点。

sentences.sentence: 'This is our ability to develop awareness of our own thinking processes – it influences how effectively we go about undertaking challenging activities.'
sentences.translation: “这就是我们培养对自身思维过程的意识的能力——它会影响我们开展具有挑战性活动的效率。”

structure.text: is our ability to develop awareness of our own thinking processes
it influences how effectively we go about undertaking challenging activities
how effectively we go about undertaking challenging activities

difficult_points: This 指上一句的 self-control，随后给出解释。
awareness of our own thinking processes 指对自己思维过程的觉察。
破折号后进一步说明自我控制影响完成困难任务的方式。
go about undertaking 表示“着手进行、处理”。

sentences.sentence: In a study carried out by Baker with toddlers and young pre-schoolers, she found that children with greater self-control solved problems more quickly when exploring an unfamiliar set-up requiring scientific reasoning.
sentences.translation: 在贝克针对学步儿童和年幼学前儿童开展的一项研究中，她发现，自我控制能力更强的儿童在探索一个需要科学推理的陌生装置时，解决问题更快。

structure.text: In a study carried out by Baker with toddlers and young pre-schoolers
that children with greater self-control solved problems more quickly when exploring an unfamiliar set-up requiring scientific reasoning
when exploring an unfamiliar set-up requiring scientific reasoning

difficult_points: carried out by Baker 是过去分词短语，修饰 study。
toddlers and young pre-schoolers 指研究对象的年龄阶段。
that 引导 found 的宾语从句，说明研究发现。
requiring scientific reasoning 后置修饰 set-up，说明该装置需要科学推理。

sentences.sentence: 'This sort of evidence makes us think that giving children the chance to play will make them more successful problem-solvers in the long run.'
sentences.translation: “这类证据让我们认为，给孩子游戏的机会会使他们从长远来看成为更成功的问题解决者。”

structure.text: that giving children the chance to play will make them more successful problem-solvers in the long run
giving children the chance to play

difficult_points: This sort of evidence 指上一句研究结果这一类证据。
makes us think 后接 that 从句，表示证据促使研究者形成判断。
giving children the chance to play 是动名词短语，在 that 从句中作主语。
in the long run 表示从长期来看。

sentences.sentence: If playful experiences do facilitate this aspect of development, say the researchers, it could be extremely significant for educational practices, because the ability to self-regulate has been shown to be a key predictor of academic performance.
sentences.translation: 研究人员说，如果游戏体验确实促进了这一方面的发展，那么它对教育实践可能极为重要，因为自我调节能力已被证明是学业表现的一个关键预测因素。

structure.text: If playful experiences do facilitate this aspect of development
it could be extremely significant for educational practices
because the ability to self-regulate has been shown to be a key predictor of academic performance

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，提出研究假设成立时的意义。
do facilitate 中 do 起强调作用，表示“确实促进”。
it 指 playful experiences facilitating development 这件事。
has been shown to be 是现在完成时被动结构，表示已有研究证明。

sentences.sentence: Gibson adds: 'Playful behaviour is also an important indicator of healthy social and emotional development.
sentences.translation: 吉布森补充说：“游戏行为也是健康的社会和情感发展的一个重要指标。

structure.text: is also an important indicator of healthy social and emotional development

difficult_points: Gibson adds 引出她在前文基础上的补充观点。
Playful behaviour 指儿童游戏中的行为表现。
indicator of 表示“……的指标”，说明可通过游戏行为判断发展状况。

sentences.sentence: In my previous research, I investigated how observing children at play can give us important clues about their well-being and can even be useful in the diagnosis of neurodevelopmental disorders like autism.'
sentences.translation: 在我之前的研究中，我考察了观察儿童游戏如何能为我们提供关于其幸福健康的重要线索，甚至还能用于诊断自闭症等神经发育障碍。”

structure.text: how observing children at play can give us important clues about their well-being and can even be useful in the diagnosis of neurodevelopmental disorders like autism

difficult_points: how 引导宾语从句，说明 investigated 的研究内容。
observing children at play 是动名词短语，在 how 从句中作主语。
can give 和 can even be useful 是并列谓语，说明观察游戏的两种作用。
like autism 举例说明 neurodevelopmental disorders。

expressions.text: be useful in the diagnosis of

sentences.sentence: Whitebread's recent research has involved developing a play-based approach to supporting children's writing.
sentences.translation: 怀特布雷德最近的研究包括开发一种基于游戏的方法来支持儿童写作。

structure.text: has involved developing a play-based approach to supporting children's writing

difficult_points: has involved 表示研究内容包括某项工作。
developing 是动名词，作 involved 的宾语。
a play-based approach 指以游戏为基础的方法。
to supporting 中 to 是介词，所以后面用 supporting。

sentences.sentence: 'Many primary school children find writing difficult, but we showed in a previous study that a playful stimulus was far more effective than an instructional one.'
sentences.translation: “许多小学生觉得写作困难，但我们在之前的一项研究中表明，游戏化刺激比教学式刺激有效得多。”

structure.text: Many primary school children find writing difficult
but we showed in a previous study
that a playful stimulus was far more effective than an instructional one

difficult_points: find writing difficult 是“find + 宾语 + 宾补”结构，表示觉得写作困难。
but 引出研究证据，与儿童写作困难的背景形成转折。
far more effective than... 中 far 强化比较级。
one 指 stimulus，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Children wrote longer and better-structured stories when they first played with dolls representing characters in the story.
sentences.translation: 当孩子们先玩代表故事角色的玩偶时，他们写出的故事更长、结构也更好。

structure.text: when they first played with dolls representing characters in the story

difficult_points: longer and better-structured 是并列比较级，共同修饰 stories。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明写作前先进行的游戏活动。
representing characters in the story 后置修饰 dolls。
first 强调游戏发生在写作之前。

sentences.sentence: In the latest study, children first created their story with Lego [1], with similar results.
sentences.translation: 在最新研究中，孩子们先用乐高[1]创作自己的故事，结果也相似。

structure.text: first created their story with Lego [1]

difficult_points: In the latest study 将该研究与前一句 previous study 区分开来。
with Lego [1] 表示使用乐高，方括号保留原文脚注标记。
with similar results 补充说明该研究也得到了类似结果。

sentences.sentence: 'Many teachers commented that they had always previously had children saying they didn't know what to write about.
sentences.translation: “许多老师评论说，以前总会有孩子说他们不知道该写些什么。

structure.text: that they had always previously had children saying they didn't know what to write about
saying they didn't know what to write about

difficult_points: commented 后接 that 宾语从句，说明老师们的反馈内容。
had always previously had 是过去完成时，表示在乐高活动之前一直存在的情况。
children saying... 是“have + 宾语 + 分词”的结构，表示有孩子说某话。
what to write about 是疑问词加不定式结构。

sentences.sentence: With the Lego building, however, not a single child said this through the whole year of the project.'
sentences.translation: 然而，在使用乐高搭建之后，整个项目一年中没有一个孩子这样说过。”

structure.text: through the whole year of the project

difficult_points: With the Lego building 表示在采用乐高搭建活动的情况下。
however 与前一句的“总有孩子不知道写什么”形成强烈对比。
not a single child 是否定强调，表示没有任何一个孩子。
this 指前一句孩子说不知道写什么这件事。

sentences.sentence: Whitebread, who directs PEDAL, trained as a primary school teacher in the early 1970s, when, as he describes, 'the teaching of young children was largely a quiet backwater, untroubled by any serious intellectual debate or controversy.'
sentences.translation: 怀特布雷德负责PEDAL的工作，他在20世纪70年代初接受小学教师培训；据他描述，当时“幼儿教学基本上是一片安静的死水，没有受到任何严肃的智力争论或争议的扰动。”

structure.text: trained as a primary school teacher in the early 1970s
when, as he describes, 'the teaching of young children was largely a quiet backwater, untroubled by any serious intellectual debate or controversy.'

difficult_points: who directs PEDAL 是非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Whitebread 的现任角色。
trained as 表示接受某种职业训练。
when 引导定语从句，修饰 in the early 1970s。
a quiet backwater 是比喻，指一个相对停滞、少有讨论的领域。

sentences.sentence: Now, the landscape is very different, with hotly debated topics such as school starting age.
sentences.translation: 如今，局面已经大不相同，出现了诸如入学年龄这类被热烈讨论的话题。

structure.text: with hotly debated topics such as school starting age

difficult_points: the landscape 是比喻用法，指教育讨论的整体局面。
with 短语补充说明现在局面的具体表现。
such as school starting age 举例说明 hotly debated topics。

sentences.sentence: 'Somehow the importance of play has been lost in recent decades.
sentences.translation: “不知为何，近几十年来，游戏的重要性已经被忽视了。
difficult_points: Somehow 表示说话者认为这种变化令人遗憾或难以解释。
has been lost 是现在完成时被动语态，说明游戏的重要性在近几十年被忽略。
in recent decades 限定变化发生的大致时期。

sentences.sentence: It's regarded as something trivial, or even as something negative that contrasts with "work".
sentences.translation: 它被看作无关紧要的东西，甚至被看作与“工作”相对立的负面事物。
difficult_points: It 指 play，即游戏。
is regarded as 是被动结构，表示社会如何看待游戏。
something trivial 和 something negative 构成递进，说明评价更加负面。
that contrasts with "work" 修饰 something negative，表示与工作形成对立。

sentences.sentence: Let's not lose sight of its benefits, and the fundamental contributions it makes to human achievements in the arts, sciences and technology.
sentences.translation: 让我们不要忽视它的好处，以及它对人类在艺术、科学和技术方面成就所作出的根本贡献。

structure.text: Let's not lose sight of its benefits
and the fundamental contributions it makes to human achievements in the arts, sciences and technology
it makes to human achievements in the arts, sciences and technology

difficult_points: Let's not... 是第一人称复数祈使句，表示呼吁。
lose sight of 表示忽视、忘记，后面并列两个宾语。
it makes... 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 contributions。
its 和 it 都指 play。

sentences.sentence: Let's make sure children have a rich diet of play experiences.
sentences.translation: 让我们确保孩子们拥有丰富多样的游戏体验。

structure.text: children have a rich diet of play experiences
a rich diet of play experiences

difficult_points: Let's make sure 是呼吁式表达，表示作者提出行动建议。
children have... 是 make sure 后的宾语从句，省略了 that。
a rich diet of play experiences 是比喻，强调游戏体验应丰富多样。
